stream_name.title: Stream Name
stream_name.description: Name of the stream to read data from.

url.title: Source URL
url.description: Full HTTP URL to the source file (e.g., https://dial.example.com/v1/files/bucket/folder/data.csv).

header_name.title: Authorization Header Name
header_name.description: Name of the HTTP header to use for authorization: 'api-key' or 'Authorization'.

header_value.title: Authorization Header Value
header_value.description: Value of the HTTP header to use for authorization.
